overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic open-world game showing a character running through a rural Southern plantation area during overcast weather. The character traverses from a large manor house along dirt paths, passing a gazebo, encountering a horse rider, and navigating around a large oak tree before passing a horse-drawn carriage.

scene_state.functional_zone: plantation house garden entrance with brick pathway

events.description: ground surface transitions from brick path to dirt road

agents.ego_description: character running away from the plantation house along the garden path

entered.detail: large two-story wooden house with wraparound porch and white railings
red brick pathway leading from the house
manicured bushes and flowering plants lining the path

segments.scene_description: The character begins running away from a large plantation house along a brick garden path. The overcast sky provides diffused lighting over the manicured grounds. The path transitions to dirt as the character moves further from the house.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt road passing a gazebo

agents.ego_description: character running along the dirt path passing by a gazebo on the right side

entered.detail: white wooden gazebo with ornate railings surrounded by bushes
massive oak tree with thick trunk and spreading branches
split-rail wooden fence running along the property line
wooden telephone pole with crossbars and wires

segments.scene_description: The character continues running along the dirt road, passing a white wooden gazebo on the right. A large oak tree becomes visible in the distance on the left, while wooden fences line the rural property. The plantation house recedes behind as the character moves deeper into the countryside.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rural road with pasture land

events.description: horse rider passes by going in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: character continuing along the dirt road as a horse rider passes by in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: rider on black horse trotting past in the opposite direction
person in red clothing standing near the fence line

entered.detail: small wooden outbuilding with sloped roof

segments.scene_description: The character runs along the open dirt road as a horse rider passes by heading toward the plantation. A person in red stands near the fence on the right. The large oak tree grows closer on the left while open pastures stretch into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural intersection near large oak tree

events.description: character curves around the large oak tree, changing direction slightly

agents.ego_description: character running around the massive oak tree, navigating the curve in the road

entered.detail: weathered two-story wooden house with dark siding
old wooden cart with broken wheels sitting by the fence

segments.scene_description: The character navigates around the massive oak tree that dominates the center of the frame. An abandoned weathered house appears on the right while the road curves. The character passes an old broken wagon by the fence line.

events.description: horse-drawn carriage appears on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: character running past a horse-drawn carriage on the left side of the road

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with two horses moving along the road

entered.detail: the large plantation house comes back into view in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes a horse-drawn carriage with two horses on the left side of the road. The plantation house becomes visible again in the distance ahead. The road continues through the rural landscape with wooden fences lining the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the manicured grounds of a plantation estate into the open rural countryside and back toward the distant manor. It begins with the character running away from a large plantation house along a brick garden path under a diffused, overcast sky, which gradually transitions into a dirt road. As the character moves deeper into the landscape, the scene opens up to reveal a white wooden gazebo and distant pastures, passing a horse rider and a figure in red standing by the fence. The camera then navigates around a massive, dominating oak tree and a weathered abandoned house before passing a broken wagon along the fence line. Finally, the path curves past a horse-drawn carriage on the left as the plantation house reappears in the distance ahead.
